titleStmt.title: SII 10.748: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 748. (A.R. No. 93 of 1917.) ON A STONE SET UP NEAR THE KARAṆAM'S HOUSE AT MALKĀPURAM, GUNTUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1499 (Dhātu)

summary.p: Records the extent of land in each of the 19 villages included in the Rāvipūṇḍi-sthalam as measured by the standard rope of thirty-eight cubits, the measurement having been made by the villagers themselves, by mutual agreement, under the orders of Ibrāhim Shāh. It further states that, on the guḍikat so arrived at, the Kāpus should pay full assessment, Muhammadans half the assessment and Brahmins no assessment. Brahmins and Muhammadans are exempt from the grazing tax.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . rājādhirāja mahārāja yibhurāṁ śaha
voḍeluṁgāri nirūpaprakārānanu Akkonā rusu
havālādāru kariyāyati rāvipūṁḍi sthalaṁ grā
māla prajalu samyāsaurucula tamalōṁ dāmu voppi
cēsukonna polaṁ kolanirnnayaṁ . yīpiḍi mūra kammini
paggaṁ 1ki muppayiyenimidiṁṭi lekhanu grāmālu 19ṭi
ṁnni cakravalayākāraṁgānu kolavagānu AInapolamu kucala 1
ki kuṁṭalu 360 lekhanu yiṁduku dhāsyaṁ na 3 lekhānu
rāvivūṁḍi ku 325 vuṁḍavelli ku 67 .
maṁdāraṁ ku 335 viriguṭṭu ku 21 ...
penuṁbāka ku 244 tāḍipalli ku 154 .
virigaṭlu kuccala 64 . virigaṭlu ku 26
pātūru ku 56 . tūmulūru ku 72 .
velagapūṁḍi ku 101 ... visvēsvaraṁ ku 27 .
haricaṁdravura ku 89 baṁdaṁrāvūru ku 50
madūru ku 54 ... virigaṭṭu ku 2 ...
virigaṭṭu ku 4 ... =
Amarēsvaraṁ ku 116 . venikepāḍu ku 40 .
dhanālakōṭi ku 348 pāmulapāḍu ku 213
lēballe ku 48 naḍuruḷapāḍu ku 72 .
virigaṭṭa ku 2 vuppuṁbālūru ku 100
peraśi staḷaṁ kuccaḷlu ku 2657 . ṭiki
kāṁpulaku 1ki paṁnnu nerasamasyanuṁn
braṁhmalu śukhavāsulu turukavārki
kuccala 1ki paṁnnu A¨rdasamaśyānu
kāṁpula yeḍlu pasulu kolcu nerasamaśyā
nu braṁhmalu śukhavāsulu turakavārki panu
lu māpu kaḍma yiḷlu kolvuku A¨rdhasamaśya
nu sahāyabu pādālāna tappaka naḍaccu
konuvāru Iṁdku Evaraṁ ganaka tappinānu gaṁga ka
¨rtta gōvu braṁhmala vadhaśēśina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru
śālivāhanaśakha subha
varuṣaṁbulu 1499
Agu nēṭi dhātasaṁ
vatsara kā¨rtti
ka śu5 śu vrāśina ra
ṁ svadatā dvigu
ṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ pa
radatānupāla
naṁ paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadatvaṁ
niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 10.748 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
